nasb.text: But God said to me, ‘You shall not build a house for My name because you are a man of war and have shed blood.’

esv.text: But God said to me, ‘You may not build a house for my name, for you are a man of war and have shed blood.’

cnv.text: 可是　神對我說：‘你不可為我的名建造殿宇，因為你是個戰士，曾殺人流血。’

ccb.text: 但上帝对我说，‘你不可为我的名建造殿宇，因为你是个战士，曾流过人的血。’
